response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal segments phonetically match the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation. 2. JSON Usage: Used the reference lyrics to accurately transcribe the song and translate key titles on the promotional slides. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the video based on precise loop segments, using a loop offset of 1 minute and 59.5 seconds to maintain high sync quality throughout. This eliminates cascading delays and ensures absolute timing precision.

subtitles.original: 奇跡が、はじまる。
さぁ
hyper jumpin’ 飛び越えよう
ハイになって灰になるまで
subtitles.english: Until we get high and turn to ash,

subtitles.original: ダンシング
hyper jumpin’ 海の向こうまで
subtitles.english: Hyper jumpin', to the other side of the sea,

subtitles.original: もっと もっと近づきたいの
subtitles.english: More, more, I want to get closer.

subtitles.original: みるだけじゃない
いっしょになれるライブ
subtitles.english: A live concert where we can be together!

subtitles.original: 360度、どこからも。
もっと もっと 高く飛びたいの
subtitles.english: More, more, I want to fly higher.

subtitles.original: hyper jumpin’ now
ここにいる。 手が触れそうなほど。
subtitles.english: Right here. Close enough to touch.
